lessons.title: Murder — Definition, Mens Rea, and Capital Murder
lessons.description: The definition of murder in Irish law is found in Section 4(1) of the Criminal Justice Act 1964.

lessons.title: Voluntary Manslaughter — Provocation
lessons.description: Voluntary manslaughter is the offence where the accused has committed what would otherwise be murder — the actus reus and mens rea for murder are both present — but where a partial defence operates to reduce the conviction from mu...

lessons.title: Involuntary Manslaughter and Dangerous Driving Causing Death
lessons.description: There are two distinct types of involuntary manslaughter, and you need to know both.

lessons.title: Assisted Suicide and the Right to Die
lessons.description: Let us begin with the foundational statutory position.
